title: Doofenshmirtz Trader
description: Doofenshmirtz Trader - This resource pack changes the wandering merchant to Dr. Heinz Doofenshmirtz from the animated series Phineas and Ferb.
body:
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/ed64d38fbf1e0dd084bc33fe465140fe12ef6189.webp)
## Description

**Doofenshmirtz Trader** - This resource pack changes the wandering merchant to Dr. Heinz Doofenshmirtz from the animated series Phineas and Ferb and changes the wandering trader spawn egg
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/egg2.png)
- - - -
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
This pack uses an OptiFine feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM) and CIT Resewn.
- - - -
